user_message:
Run an Effective-Control Satellites contradictory KYB assessment for the following PM cible.

PM CIBLE:
- Legal name: LVMH Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton SE
- Country (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2): France
- Registry identifier (SIREN / LEI / equivalent): 775670417
- Declared activity / NAF: Holding produits de luxe
- Known parent / group context: Groupe LVMH

PARAMETERS:
- Jurisdiction scope: EU      # ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (default FR)
- Monitoring mode: INITIAL            # true | false
- Run id (optional): example-001
- Analysis date: 2026-04-27

OPTIONAL CONTEXT:
- Already-known mandataires sociaux (to exclude): N/A
- Already-known UBO declarations (to exclude): Famille Arnault
- Known clients (always excluded as satellites): N/A
- Additional context: Wrapper smoke test

Apply the methodology defined in your system instructions and return JSON only.
